title: Helix Outriders
description: Promotional website for the Helix Outriders game concept (React + TypeScript).
longDescription: A promotional/landing website for the Helix Outriders game concept. Built to showcase the game’s vibe and key info in a clean, modern UI with responsive layout and polished sections. Deployed on Vercel.

title: Budget Website
description: Budget-focused web project deployed on Vercel.
longDescription: A budgeting-themed website project. Deployed on Vercel and written primarily in TypeScript with supporting CSS/HTML.

title: Wars Website
description: Web project with a hierachy system for club members to access news, book rooms and other features.
longDescription: This website was used for a club to inform memebers about upcoming events and news along with the ability to book rooms and tables. it was also built to accept new members and have a hierarchy system for the club members.

title: RESTful API for Endpoint Testing
description: REST API with Swagger UI docs, deployed on Render.
longDescription: A REST API project deployed on Render, with an interactive Swagger UI page for exploring and testing endpoints. Ideal for learning and demonstrating RESTful principles.

title: Tetris Flip
description: Retro Jam MCAST 2025 jam game: a 2.5D twist on classic Tetris with depth and dual-side play.
longDescription: Made for Retro Jam MCAST 2025 (28–30 November 2025). Tetris Flip reimagines classic Tetris in 2.5D where the shapes have depth, and the player must manage two sides of the tower. It’s a Windows release submitted for the jam, and built by a small team (design/programming + art + audio).

title: BubbleBound
description: Global Game Jam Malta 2025 game where Mr. Fisher survives an underground sewer by absorbing floating bubbles.
longDescription: Made for Global Game Jam Malta 2025 under the Bubble theme. BubbleBound follows Mr. Fisher, a fish who evolved to walk on two fins but forgot how to breathe oxygen out of water. Trapped in an underground sewer, he must find his way out and survive by absorbing floating bubbles.

title: Komet Quest
description: Educational Unity WebGL prototype built for a June 2026 thesis, teaching browser navigation through guided digital tasks.
longDescription: Komet Quest is a thesis project completed in June 2026: a Unity-based serious game and guided browser-training experience. Players learn to search, inspect pages, navigate browser states, use an in-game assistant, and complete structured digital tasks across multiple levels, with objectives, scoring, achievements, progression, and Firebase/WebGL telemetry supporting the learning flow.

title: WebGL Virtual Pet
description: Browser-based 3D virtual pet game where players care for a blob pet with feeding, toys, colour changes, and progression.
longDescription: A React and WebGL virtual pet prototype built with Vite, React Three Fiber, Three.js, Firebase Auth, and Firestore. Players care for a blob-style pet by feeding it, playing with toys, petting it, managing hunger and happiness, gaining feed/play EXP, levelling up, and unlocking colours, with persistent cloud saves and an admin panel for saved pet data.

title: VR Farm Simulator
description: Simple Unity VR farming game experiment with crop planting, harvesting, tractor controls, and object interaction.
longDescription: A Unity VR farming simulator built as a simple experiment with VR mechanics and farm gameplay. Players can plant and harvest wheat, manage seeds and inventory, drive a tractor, place fences, collect crates, and interact with cows using XR hand interactions, with custom systems for crop growth, inventory, vehicle controls, object rotation, and animal touch feedback.

title: VR Escape Room
description: Unity VR escape room with sci-fi puzzle rooms, object grabbing, keycards, pressure plates, and keypad interactions.
longDescription: A Unity VR escape room experience built around three puzzle rooms and a final victory room. Players solve keycard, coloured box, pressure plate, power core, and keypad puzzles using XR grab interactions, snap points, controller button triggers, spatial audio, visual feedback, and scene progression systems.

title: Personal Portfolio
description: My portfolio website with a projects section, sorting, and detail pages.
longDescription: A personal portfolio website deployed on Vercel. The repo is mainly TypeScript with CSS styling and some MDX/HTML. Built with a proper multi-page structure (projects list + project details + contact) and ongoing UI polish, including light-mode improvements.
